title: pilosella caespitosa subsp. dissoluta
intro: Pilosella caespitosa subsp. dissoluta, also known as a subspecies of the plant Pilosella caespitosa, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pilosella caespitosa subsp. dissoluta are said to include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially treating gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, this plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
